subcodes.first_line: At all times hath the Pen of the Most Merciful been occupied with the remembrance of His loved ones. Some have hearkened thereto and, through their deeds, have attained its bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در جمیع احیان قلم رحمن بذکر دوستان مشغول بعضی شنیدند و بعمل بان فائز شدند و
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
